zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理上行受阻
zh.content:
当前ETH价格围绕1780窄幅震荡，整体运行在20日均线1767上方，短线结构仍偏多但动能放缓。多头趋势延续中。但需突破1790确认

MACD指标维持正值2.70附近，显示多头动能仍在，但未出现明确发散，短期缺乏加速信号。量能温和放大中。RSI暂缺参考。

下方支撑关注1777及1767均线区域，上方阻力集中于1780，突破后有望上探1785至1800区间。区间震荡为主。等待方向选择。

操作建议以区间交易为主，靠近1777-1767分批低吸，突破1780可轻仓追多并设好止损控制风险。注意波动风险。避免追高。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1779.77, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average near 1767.44, which suggests buyers retain modest short-term control. The narrow daily range between 1777.41 and 1780.56 and the negligible 24-hour gain of 0.03% indicate a market that is consolidating rather than trending aggressively. This type of price action often reflects balanced participation as traders wait for a stronger catalyst before committing to a decisive directional move.

The available technical indicators present a cautiously constructive picture. Price remaining above the SMA(20) supports the idea of an underlying bullish bias, although the advantage is not yet decisive. A positive MACD reading of 2.70657 points to improving upward momentum, even though the unavailable signal line prevents confirmation of a crossover. Likewise, the absence of an RSI reading limits the ability to judge whether the market is approaching overbought or oversold conditions, making additional confirmation advisable.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 1777, followed by stronger support near the 20-period moving average at approximately 1767. A sustained move below these levels could encourage additional selling pressure and shift sentiment toward the downside. On the upside, resistance begins near the recent high of 1780.56. A convincing breakout above that area, supported by expanding volume, could open the path toward higher resistance zones as bullish momentum strengthens.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish stance while price remains above the moving average, but patience is warranted until volatility expands and confirms direction. Momentum traders could look for a breakout above resistance before initiating fresh long positions, while conservative participants may prefer waiting for either a confirmed MACD signal or a successful retest of support. Effective risk management, including disciplined stop-loss placement and appropriate position sizing, remains essential in the current low-volatility environment.
